notes: External model files are downloaded from a pinned Hugging Face revision and verified by SHA-256 before activation.
The inspected ONNX encoder accepts full feature sequences and lengths but does not expose streaming cache tensors; it is a Vietnamese baseline candidate until streaming parity is proven.
No model weights are committed to this repository.

models.displayName: NVIDIA Parakeet CTC Vietnamese research candidate

notes: Research-only intake for the bilingual/code-switch roadmap; no browser-ready Vietnamese/English RNN-T ONNX model pack has been verified.
Upstream metadata describes a NeMo/FastConformer CTC Vietnamese checkpoint, not this repository's manifest v2 encoder/predictor/joiner streaming graph contract.
Hugging Face license metadata is "other"; redistribution and release use are not cleared, and the PWA will not download or install this candidate.

note: Catalog entries may point to external model files only when license and checksum metadata are documented. Blocked research candidates must remain non-installable until a browser-compatible manifest, license clearance, and runtime validation exist.
